title: Bridge Essay: The Fundamental Basis of Palpitations: A Neurocardiology Approach.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**The Fundamental Basis of Palpitations: A Neurocardiology Approach.** — Curr Cardiol Rev (2022). DOI: 10.2174/1573403X17666210909123930. PMID: 34503434. BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVE: Palpitations are a common symptom that may indicate cardiac arrhythmias, be a somatic complaint in anxiety disorders, and can be present in patients without either condition. The objective of this review was to explore the pathways and fundamental mechanisms through which individuals appreciate palpitations.
